message:
test(labruntime): port all 27 undo.rs tokio tests to asupersync RuntimeFixture

Ports the complete undo.rs test suite (27 tests) from #[tokio::test] to
RuntimeFixture::current_thread().block_on(), exercising UndoExecutor with
StorageHandle and MockWezterm under the asupersync runtime.

Covers: workflow_abort (success, completed, waiting, no exec id),
pane_close (success, fallback, nonexistent, no payload), manual/custom/none
strategies, already-undone guard, not-found paths, guidance messages.

Bead: ft-22x4r

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
